debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) = exp (b ^ 2) - exp (a ^ 2)

failed_attempts:
simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub'
      (f := fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) (f' := fun x => 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) a b)

simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub
      (f := fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) (f' := fun x : ℝ => 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) a b
      (by
        intro x hx
        simpa [Real.deriv_exp, Real.deriv_pow, mul_add, add_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
          mul_comm, pow_two] using (by
            simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] : deriv (fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) x = 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2))))
  done

simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul, pow_two] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub (f := fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) (f' := fun x => 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) (a := a) (b := b)
      (fun x => by
        simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul] using
          (by
            simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, pow_two, two_mul] using
              (Real.hasDerivAt_exp (x ^ 2)).comp x ((hasDerivAt_pow 2 x)).mul_const 2))
      (by
        intro x
        exact (differentiableAt_pow 2 x).exp))
  done

simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (integral_deriv_eq_sub (fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) a b)

simpa [two_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg] using

simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using

simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul, sub_eq_add_neg] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub (f := fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) (f' := fun x => 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) a b
      (by
        intro x hx
        simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul] using
          (by
            simpa [Real.deriv_exp, deriv_pow, mul_add, add_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul] ))
      (by
        have : IntervalIntegrable (fun x : ℝ => 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) volume a b := by
          simpa using
            (intervalIntegrable_continuous (f := fun x : ℝ => 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2))
              ((continuous_const.mul (continuous_id.mul (continuous_exp.comp (continuous_pow 2))))))
        simpa using this))

simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub (f := fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) (f' := fun x => 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) a b
      (by
        intro x hx
        have hderiv : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) ((2 * x) * exp (x ^ 2)) x := by
          simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul] using
            ((Real.hasDerivAt_exp (x ^ 2)).comp x ((hasDerivAt_pow 2 x).mul_const 2))
        simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul] using hderiv)

simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, two_mul, mul_add, add_mul] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub (f := fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) (f' := fun x => 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) a b
      (by
        intro x hx
        simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
          (by
            simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
              (by
                simpa using (Real.deriv_exp (x ^ 2)).trans (by
                  simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, pow_two] using
                    (by
                      simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
                        (by
                          simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
                            ((Real.deriv_exp (x ^ 2)).trans (by
                              simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
                                (by
                                  simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
                                    (by
                                      simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
                                        (by
                                          have : deriv (fun y : ℝ => y ^ 2) x = 2 * x := by
                                            simpa [pow_two] using (by
                                              simpa using (Real.deriv_mul_const x 1))
                                          simpa [this, pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
                                            (by
                                              simpa [this] using (deriv.comp x (fun y : ℝ => exp y) (fun y : ℝ => y ^ 2))))))))))))))))
  done
